title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage local LLMs with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same capabilities as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama as a local LLM provider for chains, agents, and RAG.
highlights: drop-in replacement for OpenAI in LangChain

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, admin, multi-user) packaged as a lightweight Docker image.

title: ollama-cli
summary: A friendly interactive CLI (written in Go) that wraps the Ollama REST API for chatting and pulling models.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s chat interface.
highlights: supports any model exposed by Ollama

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Community node for n8n workflow automation; call local LLMs in no-code flows.
highlights: credential-less if Ollama open on localhost

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama supporting .NET 6+, async streaming, and dependency injection.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & CPU variants and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Collection of ready-made docker-compose stacks bundling Ollama with WebUI, Chroma, and more.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model; slash commands & conversation threads.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper for Ollama with GenServer-based process management and Telemetry events.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with tokio, serde, and built-in CLI example.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you query local Ollama models from within your notes.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot using Socket Mode to answer questions with Ollama models; includes rate-limiting.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot (reddit showcase)
summary: Developer shows a weekend project combining Ollama + Chroma + Gradio for a private RAG chatbot.
